message:
feat: add font metrics, canvas renderer/shapes, SVG accessibility and theming modules

Introduce five new feature modules that extend the rendering pipeline:

- fm-core/font_metrics.rs: Deterministic cross-platform text measurement
  using pre-computed character width tables. This eliminates platform-
  dependent font rendering differences between SVG, Canvas, and Terminal
  targets by providing consistent width estimates for SystemUi, Monospace,
  SansSerif, Serif, and Condensed font presets. Without this, node sizing
  varies between browsers and OSes, causing layout drift.

- fm-render-canvas/renderer.rs: Canvas2D diagram renderer that draws
  computed layouts to HTML Canvas contexts. Includes configuration for
  colors, fonts, padding, and cluster styling. This is the bridge between
  fm-layout's abstract LayoutNodeBox/LayoutEdgePath and actual pixel output.

- fm-render-canvas/shapes.rs: Canvas2D shape drawing functions implementing
  all NodeShape variants (rect, rounded, stadium, diamond, circle, etc.)
  using the Canvas2D path API. Extracted from the renderer to keep shape
  geometry isolated from rendering orchestration logic.

- fm-render-svg/a11y.rs: Accessibility features for SVG output including
  ARIA attribute generation, human-readable text alternatives for nodes
  and edges, diagram-level descriptions with structural summaries, and
  CSS utilities for prefers-contrast/prefers-reduced-motion media queries.
  This ensures generated diagrams are screen-reader navigable.

- fm-render-svg/theme.rs: SVG theming system with 10 presets (Default,
  Dark, Forest, Neutral, Corporate, Neon, Pastel, HighContrast, Monochrome,
  Blueprint). Generates CSS custom properties for node/edge/cluster colors,
  fonts, and borders. The HighContrast and Monochrome presets specifically
  target WCAG AA compliance requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
